items.title: 36氪首发 | 前非夕科技核心业务合伙人创业，做垂域工业智能体，获数千万元种子轮融资
items.description:
作者 | 乔钰杰
  编辑 | 袁斯来
  硬氪获悉，上海追知工程科技有限公司（以下简称“追知工科”）近日完成数千万元种子轮融资，由L2F光源创业者基金、尚融资本、一村资本联合投资。本轮融资将主要用于核心产品研发、团队建设及市场拓展。
  追知工科成立于2024年2月，是一家聚焦垂域工业智能体的科技企业，同时也是上海交通大学成果转化企业、上海人工智能研究院战略孵化企业。公司希望通过将人工智能技术引入工业制造场景，提升复杂基石工艺制程环节的自动化和智能化水平，重点解决制造业柔性生产和熟练工人严重短缺等问题。
  公司创始人袁琳，曾作为非夕科技业务合伙人，推

items.title: 36氪首发 | 前阿里平头哥半导体高管创业，RISC-V芯片厂商获新一轮融资
items.description:
作者 | 乔钰杰
  编辑 | 袁斯来
  硬氪获悉，深圳市智创芯微电子有限公司（简称“智创芯”）完成 Pre-A轮融资。本轮融资由启迪之星创投、深圳开鸿数字产业发展有限公司（简称“深开鸿”）发起的产业基金、珠海正菱集团、以及应广科技等机构共同参与。
  本轮融资完成后，智创芯将与深开鸿围绕开源鸿蒙（OpenHarmony）与开源RISC-V的融合展开战略合作，共同推进“双开源”软硬件生态建设，加速相关技术在智能终端等产业场景落地。
  智创芯成立于2022年，由前阿里巴巴平头哥高管陈昊创立，核心团队来自阿里平头哥、中兴、海思等半导体企业，拥有多年的行业

  36氪获悉，中国神华公告，预计2026年上半年归属于上市公司股东的净利润为263亿元至298亿元，同比增长6.9%-21.1%。业绩变动主要系煤化工业务量及自有铁路、港口、航运业务量增加，带动相关业务利润同比增长。
  中国人寿：预计上半年净利润同比增长约215%-235%

items.title: 36氪首发 | 浙大系桌面CNC团队获商汤国香、首形科技等近亿元天使轮，要用AI技术降低制造门槛
items.description:
作者 | 张子怡
  编辑 | 袁斯来
  硬氪获悉，桌面级CNC（数控机床）企业「奇塑科技」于近期完成近亿元人民币天使轮融资。本轮融资由商汤国香、首形科技、全新世、奇绩创坛共同投资。本轮资金将主要用于桌面级CNC软硬件产品的研发、量产以及后续的市场营销。
  在消费级3D打印机和激光雕刻机已完成大众市场教育，并诞生了诸如拓竹、xTool等多个头部企业后，能够实现“从软材到硬材强三维加工”的CNC产品，被视为消费级制造领域的下一片万亿蓝海。
  早在2018年行业普遍聚焦3D打印赛道时，奇塑科技团队就已将目光投向CNC领域。在创始人夏楠看来，CNC是制造

items.title: 36氪首发 | 前博世自动驾驶算法工程师创业，用合成数据做触觉大模型
items.description:
触觉手套（图源/企业）
  
   本文约2400字，建议阅读6分钟
  
  作者丨欧雪
  编辑丨袁斯来
  硬氪获悉，空间智能公司「大衍科技」近期完成数千万元天使轮融资，由松禾清湛领投，浙江省省金控与广州番禺创新基金等国资背景机构参与。资金将主要用于触觉大模型研发、机器人数据产线建设及团队扩张。
  「大衍科技」2025年5月成立于浙江桐乡，是一家专注于4D世界重建、世界模型及可控扩散模型技术的空间智能公司。
  创始人兼CEO杨林是新加坡国立大学计算机博士，曾在速腾、酷睿程、比亚迪、苏州博世等企业深耕自动驾驶算法7-8年。此外，公司核心技术源自首席科学家、联合国科学院院士、加拿大工程院

items.title: 人形机器人公司逐际动力完成2亿美元Pre-IPO轮融资，投后估值达150亿元｜最前线
items.description:
作者｜黄楠
  编辑｜袁斯来
  硬氪获悉，通用人形机器人公司逐际动力LimX Dynamics宣布完成Pre-IPO轮融资，融资金额近2亿美元，投资方包括IDG资本、蓝思科技、GGG Group与Redstone VC、华山资本、合肥滨湖产发集团等。此外，阿联酋磊石资本（Stone Venture）连续多轮追投，绿洲资本、基石资本、南山战新投、尚颀资本、蔚来资本等多家老股东超额加注。
  融资资金将重点用于大小脑融合技术的突破和产品化，推动数千台全自主人形机器人的规模化部署，加强全球市场拓展。公司将进一步完善全球制造与交付能力，加快中东、欧洲及亚洲其他国家地区等重点市场的布局，并持续建设面向

items.titleOriginal: From ML Predictions to Informed Diagnostic Assistance Using the Toulmin Model of Argumentation

items.titleOriginal: Format Sensitivity Index: Token-Controlled Prompt Wrapper Robustness and Schema Compliance in LLM Benchmarking

items.titleOriginal: Faithful, Not Corrective: Message-Format Effects in Multi-Hop Agent Relays Are Tier-Dependent

items.titleOriginal: Boltzmann MapReduce: A Partition-Function Reduce for Forkable Sandboxes

items.titleOriginal: Interpreting Latent CoT Reasoning as Dynamical Systems

items.titleOriginal: YUKTI: From Natural-Language Situations to Robust, Verifiable Decisions An Uncertainty-Typed Proposition IR, Assumption-Robust Pareto Frontiers, and a Regret Certificate

items.titleOriginal: GES-TSP: Graph Edge Sparsification for TSP

items.titleOriginal: Position: Every Ground Truth is a Human Construction, not an Objective Truth

Abstract: This study systematically compares Turbo-Quant and SpectralQuant KV-cache compression, evaluating non-dominated schemes, including WHT rotation with Beta Lloyd-Max and QJL, through a statistical validation methodology that separates systematic codec d
items.titleOriginal: Ablation, Statistical Inference, and Validation for KV-Cache Compression

items.title: 野外 SciML：关于结构先验何时有用、何时有害的诊断研究
items.description:
arXiv:2607.09684v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Scientific Machine Learning (SciML) methods such as Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (NODEs), Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs), and Universal Differential Equations (UDEs) are most effective when structural priors reflect reliable govern
items.titleOriginal: SciML in the Wild: A Diagnostic Study of When Structural Priors Help and When They Hurt

items.description:
arXiv:2607.09686v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language models separate total parameter count from per-token active computation, but local inference systems often still require the full model, key-value cache, runtime buffers, and operatingsystem headroom to fit in
items.titleOriginal: MawForge: Memory-Bounded Expert Materialization for Local Mixture-of-Experts Inference

Abstract: Low autocorrelation binary sequences problem (LABS) is a hard combinatorial optimization challenge with important applications in communications, signal processing, and satellite navigation. This paper proposes a hybrid search framework that combines
items.titleOriginal: Prioritizing Search Space Regions in the Low Autocorrelation Binary Sequences Problem

items.title: 编码代理实际上需要在什么背景下采取行动？
items.description:
arXiv:2607.09691v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: A modern coding agent can hold an entire repository in its context window. Most of its reading is wasted -- and the interesting question is not how much context an agent can use, but what it actually \emph{needs}. We study that question at the moment
items.titleOriginal: What Context Does a Coding Agent Actually Need to Act?

items.description:
arXiv:2607.09880v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Clinical time series are central to patient monitoring, risk assessment, and clinical decision support. However, they are often sparse, irregularly sampled, and asynchronous, making it difficult for models to identify the temporal evidence required fo
items.titleOriginal: CLIR-Bench: Benchmarking Multimodal Question Answering over Irregular Clinical Time Series

items.description:

Abstract: We present Index-1.9B, a series of open small language models developed at Bilibili. The series comprises four models: Index-1.9B-Base, a foundation model with 1.9 billion non-embedding parameters pre-trained on 2.8 trillion predominantly Chinese and
items.titleOriginal: Index SLM Technical Report

items.title: RouteRec：推荐代理选择和聚合的严格评估
items.description:
arXiv:2607.09908v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Recommender systems increasingly face a choice among heterogeneous agents -- collaborative filters, sequential models, content-based retrievers, and LLM-based rerankers -- yet no single agent is uniformly best. We study this choice as task-aware agent
items.titleOriginal: RouteRec: Strict Evaluation of Recommender-Agent Selection and Aggregation

items.title: 使用语言模型进行全球并购套利预测
items.description:
arXiv:2607.09921v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: We present a language-model forecasting system for merger arbitrage, a specialized high-stakes financial setting in which the task is to predict the outcome of announced M\&A deals. Unlike prior work on judgmental forecasting with LLMs, which has
items.titleOriginal: Global Merger-Arbitrage Forecasting with Language Models

items.description:
arXiv:2607.09932v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Large language models are increasingly used to summarize clinical trial results for healthcare providers, patients, and payers, but their tendency to hallucinate poses significant risks in this high-stakes context. This study introduces a benchmark ev
items.titleOriginal: Faithful by Design: Evaluating and Improving LLM-Generated Clinical Trial Summaries for Multi-Stakeholder Audiences

items.title: 工作负载驱动的设备上实时字幕翻译优化
items.description:
arXiv:2607.09957v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: This report studies on-device English-to-Traditional-Chinese subtitle translation for Taiwan under short inputs, short outputs, batch-size-one inference, low latency, and privacy constraints. These conditions limit the value of optimizations designed
items.titleOriginal: Workload-Driven Optimization for On-Device Real-Time Subtitle Translation

items.title: 量化 LLM 推理中的无声失败：基于分类的空心收敛和失败模式转换分析
items.description:
arXiv:2607.09999v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: We show that post-training quantization can silently alter how large language models reason even when task accuracy is preserved. Using a six-category failure taxonomy validated by two independent human annotators (Cohen's $\kappa$ = 0.906), we classi
items.titleOriginal: Silent Failures in Quantized LLM Reasoning: A Taxonomy-Based Analysis of Hollow Convergence and Failure Mode Shifts

items.title: 大型网络爬行语料库中文本包含的稳健、可扩展检测
items.description:
arXiv:2607.10020v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: We present FindMyText, an open-source Python package designed to efficiently assess whether a given text appears, in part or in full, within a text corpus. The tool builds on prior techniques for document fingerprinting, but extends them with a novel
items.titleOriginal: Robust, Scalable Detection of Text Containment in Large Web-Crawled Corpora
